basic_details.job_title: CDB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Senior Auditor, Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Coconut Development Board (CDB) has released the official Various Group 'A' and Group 'B' Posts Notification 2026 on 30 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced under the CDB Various Group 'A' and Group 'B' Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 56 years with qualifications such as CA, CMA, M.Com, MBA, MCA, B.E./B.Tech, Master's Degree, Bachelor's Degree, Chemistry, Bio-Chemistry, and other relevant disciplines can apply through offline mode on or before 28-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application form details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Chartered Accountants of India, Associate of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India M.Com, MBA, M.Sc,
qualification.details: Audit Officer: Associate of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India with two years' experience in auditing; or Associate of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India with three years' experience in auditing; or Master degree in Commerce with seven years' experience in auditing in a Government office or recognised research institutes or universities or public sector undertakings or statutory or autonomous bodies. Systems Analyst: Master degree in Computer Applications or equivalent with Bachelor's degree in Science from a recognized University or Institute; or Bachelor degree in Computer Engineering or Electronics and Communication or Information Technology or equivalent from a recognized University or Institute; and two years post qualification experience as system analyst in an institute of repute. Administrative Officer: Master degree from a recognised University or institute with five years experience in administration and establishment matters in level 6 (Rs. 35,400-1,12,400) in the pay matrix in a Government office or autonomous body or statutory body or public sector undertaking. Accounts Officer: Associate of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India; or Associate of the Institute of Cost and Management Accountants of India; or Master degree in Commerce from a recognized University or institute with pass in the Intermediate Examination of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India or pass in the Intermediate Examination of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India and five years experience in accounting work in a Government office or public sector undertaking or autonomous body or statutory body or recognized organisation. Market Promotion Officer: Master degree in Business Administration with marketing specialization or equivalent or Master degree in Agriculture or Horticulture with Postgraduate diploma in Marketing Management or equivalent from a recognised University or institute and two years experience in marketing in a recognised institute. Export Promotion Officer: Bachelor degree in any subject with diploma in International Business or Export Promotion or Foreign Trade or equivalent and three years' experience in export promotion work in a Government organisation or public sector undertaking or autonomous body or statutory body. Senior Auditor: Master degree in Commerce or Bachelor degree in any discipline from a recognised University or institute with pass in the Intermediate Examination of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India or pass in the Intermediate Examination of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India; and Five years experience in auditing in a Government office or public sector undertaking or autonomous body or statutory body. Senior Chemist: Master degree in Chemistry or Bio-Chemistry from a recognised University or institute with five years experience in the analysis of edible oils and food products. Assistant (Store): Bachelor degree from a recognized University or institute; Diploma in Materials Management or Warehousing Management or Purchasing or Logistics or Public Procurement from a recognised University or institute; and two years experience in handling stores and keeping Accounts in a store or a concern of Central or State Govt. or autonomous or statutory organisation or public sector undertakings or University or Banks or in a Private Sector Organisation listed on the Stock Exchange of India.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CDB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CDB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the Coconut Development Board recruitment is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CDB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for Various Group 'A' and Group 'B' posts released by the Coconut Development Board in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for CDB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the Coconut Development Board Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts in CDB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under the Coconut Development Board Recruitment 2026 is 56 years.

faq.question: Q5. What are the different posts available in CDB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts include Audit Officer, Systems Analyst, Administrative Officer, Accounts Officer, Market Promotion Officer, Export Promotion Officer, Senior Auditor, Senior Chemist, and Assistant (Store).

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the posts in CDB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary for the posts ranges from Rs. 35,400-1,12,400 to Rs. 56,100-1,77,500, depending on the specific post and pay matrix level.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for CDB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC categories in the official notification for the Coconut Development Board Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the educational qualification required for the Systems Analyst post?
faq.answer: For the Systems Analyst post, candidates need a Master's degree in Computer Applications or equivalent with a Bachelor's degree in Science, or a Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, and two years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this CDB recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation, meaning eligible government employees may be considered for these positions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for CDB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for CDB Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the Important Links section provided, which includes a direct link to the PDF document.
